name: Gemini Series (Gemini 1.0, 1.5, 2.0)
parameter_count: Undisclosed; Gemini Ultra is estimated to be one of the largest models ever trained
training_approach: Multimodal pretraining on text, image, audio, video, and code data with RLHF alignment
key_innovations: Natively multimodal — trained jointly on text, images, audio, and video from the start
Gemini 1.5 introduced a 1M+ token context window using mixture-of-experts
Gemini 2.0 added agentic capabilities with tool use and code execution
Near-perfect recall on needle-in-a-haystack evaluations at 1M tokens
lineage_path: Transformer -> BERT -> T5 -> PaLM -> PaLM 2 -> Gemini 1.0 -> Gemini 1.5 -> Gemini 2.0
cultural_impact: Gemini represented Google DeepMind's flagship response to GPT-4 and established Google as a leading competitor in the frontier model race. The 1M+ token context window in Gemini 1.5 set a new standard for long-context AI, and the series demonstrated that natively multimodal training could produce models competitive with or exceeding text-first approaches.
